abilities.description: Forces an enemy unit to move slower and for allies to attack it more quickly. Chen can attack the Penitence target with bonus attack range.
abilities.name: Penitence
abilities.story: Although Chen's brand of animal enthrallment isn't quite strong enough to control the minds of enemy heroes, it still tests their resolve in combat.

abilities.description: Chen takes control of an enemy or neutral creep. If the persuaded creep's base health is naturally below the health minimum, its base health will be raised to the health minimum. Converted creeps will have increased movement speed and bonus damage.
abilities.name: Holy Persuasion
abilities.story: Although they may not be knights, Chen incorporates beasts into the Fold in the same way he himself was converted.

abilities.description: Passively provides an aura that grants increased health regeneration. Can be cast on allies to provide them with bonus armor and increase the healing they receive. Can be cast on converted creeps to teleport them to Chen. If cast on Chen, all units controlled by Chen will be teleported to him. Taking damage dispels the buff.
abilities.name: Divine Favor
abilities.story: Chen's zeal is infectious, blessing his allies with vitality and compelling them to his side.

abilities.description: Heals all allied heroes on the map as well as all units under Chen's control. A large heal is applied at first and a slow heal over time is applied for 8 afterwards.
abilities.name: Hand of God
abilities.story: Using the mental link with his thralls, Chen calls down restoration and well-being to those who share his fanaticism.

abilities.description: Sacrifice the life of this unit to heal any ally or damage an enemy with the current level of Hand of God.
abilities.name: Martyrdom

description: Converts creeps to his cause, building an army. Converted at sword-point after a disastrous battle, Chen quickly became one of the Fold's most zealous knights. Raised among the clans of the Hazhadal Barrens, Chen adapts his skills of animal enthrallment to perform Holy Persuasions and Martyrdoms, compelling packs of creatures of the forest to fight and sacrifice for his cause. His allies are graced with Divine Favor, while foes are forced to atone through the magnified pains of Penitence. Chen's devotion does not go unrewarded. The Hand of God aids his companions in their quests, intervening at critical moments to heal their injuries and save them from fatal blows.  Support Pusher  Arachnophobic, Steed, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Chen's fun names in DotA were Chechen and Jackie Chen, a pun on the name of the famed actor Jackie Chan.

hero_talents.talent_right: Hand of God applies a Strong Dispel
hero_talents.talent_left: +200/+10 Hand of God Heal/Heal Over Time
